Generates a new node identifier not already used in the graph.

getAge() - Method in class model.Patient

Returns a stable color for an agent based on its id.

Returns the list of agents currently on this edge.

Returns all agents currently managed by the simulation.
getAgentType() - Method in class model.Agent

Returns the list of all agents currently on this node.

Returns all edges in the graph.

Returns all nodes currently contained in the graph.

Returns all nodes contained in the graph.

getAveragePassedSpeed() - Method in class model.Node
Returns the average speed of agents that passed through this node.

getBpm() - Method in class model.Patient
 
getCapacity() - Method in class model.Edge
Returns the maximum capacity of the edge.

Returns the cargo weight carried by this agent.

getCongestionWaitCycles() - Method in class model.Node
 
getCurrentEffectiveDistance() - Method in class model.Agent
 
getCurrentPath() - Method in class model.Agent
Returns the current path followed by the agent.
getCurrentPosition() - Method in class model.Agent
Returns the current position node of the agent.

Returns the current simulation tick.

getDestination() - Method in class model.Agent
Returns the destination node of the agent.

Returns the destination node of the edge.

Returns the readable name of the accident type.
getDistance() - Method in class model.Edge
Returns the distance of the edge.

getEdges(Node) - Method in class model.Graph
Returns all outgoing edges of a node.

Returns the graph associated with the simulation.
getId() - Method in class model.Agent
Returns the unique identifier of the agent.
getId() - Method in class model.Node
Returns the node identifier.
getInitialPosition() - Method in class model.Agent
Returns the initial position of the agent.
getMaxCapacity() - Method in class model.Node
Returns the maximum capacity of the node.
getName() - Method in class model.Node
 
getName() - Method in class model.Patient

Returns all neighboring nodes reachable from a given node.

Returns the next node the agent is heading to.

getPathIndex() - Method in class model.Agent

getTypeMultiplier(EdgeType) - Method in class pathfinding.CongestionAwarePathFinder
Multiplicateur moyen par type d'arête (sans tenir compte du type d'agent, car le pathfinder est global — on utilise une valeur moyenne).
getX() - Method in class model.Node
Returns the X coordinate of the node.
getY() - Method in class model.Node
Returns the Y coordinate of the node.
graph - Variable in class controller.GraphController
Graph currently managed by the controller
graph - Variable in class pathfinding.AStarPathFinder
 
graph - Variable in class pathfinding.CongestionAwarePathFinder
 
graph - Variable in class pathfinding.DijkstraPathFinder
Graph used for path computation
graph - Variable in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Graph used for the simulation
graph - Variable in class view.GraphView
Graph currently rendered by the view
Graph - Class in model
Represents a graph using an adjacency list structure.
Graph() - Constructor for class model.Graph
Creates an empty graph.
GraphController - Class in controller
Controller responsible for building and configuring the graph.
GraphController(Graph) - Constructor for class controller.GraphController
Creates a controller bound to a graph instance.
GraphView - Class in view
 
GraphView() - Constructor for class view.GraphView
Creates the view and prepares background click handling.
